"[14] [Appended, 14:10:34] [1] [14:07:39 GMT-07:00 02 Jul 2026] (530) 566-3890 has entered the chat [14:07:39 GMT-07:00 02 Jul 2026] (530) 566-3890: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. Time of request: 09:07PM UTC. A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 40.7972 (N), Longitude -123.4610 (W). The user is NOT AT THE LOCATION of the emergency. [14:07:39 GMT-07:00 02 Jul 2026] (530) 566-3890: The battery level of the user's device is 61-100%. Their phone number is +15305663890. The user requests help with a FIRE emergency. This request is for SOMEONE ELSE. NO ONE is on fire. NO ONE is trapped. The specific emergency is a GRASS OR WILDFIRE fire. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected. [14:07:39 GMT-07:00 02 Jul 2026] (530) 566-3890: The user requests help at the INCIDENT LOCATION described as: Fire mile marker 13 on Highway 299 FRIED Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 354 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! [14:07:40 GMT-07:00 02 Jul 2026] (530) 566-3890: Two-way text with the user is now available. [14:08:07 GMT-07:00 02 Jul 2026] Andrew Tompkins has entered the chat [14:08:07 GMT-07:00 02 Jul 2026] Andrew Tompkins: This is CHP text to 911, let me transfer you to the fire department, take all precautions for your safety.
